entries.rationale_summary: Full uptrend entry (close > SMA50 > SMA200) with healthy 0.75% pullback from 20-day high. Strong volume confirmation (2.68x) and excellent liquidity (374M GBP avg daily volume). HSBC is mega-cap UK financial, uncorrelated with existing Materials positions. Stop-loss 556 bps (5 ATR) provides conservative defined risk. Gap risk buffer applied to position sizing given DAILY_CHECK execution mode.
